# ShoppingBasket

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ShoppingBasket;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ShoppingBasket { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
cart, e-commerce, store, purchase, products, items, ingredients

## Categories
shopping

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/shopping-basket)
